TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Pyasan_mu, title = Pyasan_mu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pyasan_mu} }

S.FORM: = Pyasan mu = Pyasan pyasan kuxul misu balay, niqan emptgsa niqan laqi empatas, pyasan pyasan kuxul misu balay, egu slhayan egu hrpasan, pyasan pyasan kuxul misu balay, miyah ku matas pyasan kjiyax.
S.PHON: = pjasan mu = pjasan pjasan kuxul misu balaj, niqan əmptgsa niqan laqi əmpatas, pjasan pjasan kuxul misu balaj, əgu slħajan əgu ħɾpasan, pjasan pjasan kuxul misu balaj, mijaħ ku matas pjasan kɟijax.
S.FORM: = Pyasan mu = Pyasan pyasan kuxul misu balay, niqan emptgsa niqan laqi empatas, pyasan pyasan kuxul misu balay, egu slhayan egu hrpasan, pyasan pyasan kuxul misu balay, miyah ku matas pyasan kjiyax.
S.PHON: = pjasan mu = pjasan pjasan kuxul misu balaj, niqan əmptgsa niqan laqi əmpatas, pjasan pjasan kuxul misu balaj, əgu slħajan əgu ħɾpasan, pjasan pjasan kuxul misu balaj, mijaħ ku matas pjasan kɟijax.
